title: pavonia cabraliana
intro: Pavonia cabraliana, also known as the Brazilian rose-mallow or pavonia, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family (Malvaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Pavonia cabraliana include its potential to treat various ailments such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in folk medicine to promote healing and alleviate symptoms.
